analysis_result: 2 independent external validation cohorts: TCGA (n=5) and DKFZ (n=33). Toronto cohort (n=16) was the discovery cohort and Combined cohort (n=54) was the pooled analysis, as shown in Supplementary Fig. 1 panels a-d.
discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT. Both the reported result and model result identify 2 independent validation cohorts with matching sample sizes: TCGA (n=5) and DKFZ (n=33). Verified against Supplementary Fig. 1 which shows consensus clustering for 4 panels: (a) Toronto Cohort n=16 (discovery), (b) TCGA Cohort n=5 (validation), (c) DKFZ Cohort n=33 (validation), (d) Combined Cohort n=54. The model provided additional (correct) context about the Toronto discovery cohort and the combined cohort, but the core answer regarding the number and size of validation cohorts matches exactly.
